summary: TrendScout Phase 2 Admin Image Review Dashboard testing complete. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified working. All image-review endpoints functional with proper admin auth protection.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/metrics without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/products without auth returns 401
Backend: POST /api/admin/image-review/bulk without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/metrics (admin) returns total_products, needs_review, pending, approved, rejected, placeholder, pinned
Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/products (no filter) returns all products
Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/products?status=needs_review returns filtered products
Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/products?status=approved returns approved products
Backend: Product list has required fields (id, product_name, category)
Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/products/{product_id} returns full product data
Backend: GET /api/admin/image-review/products/{nonexistent_id} returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/admin/image-review/products/{product_id}/approve sets status=approved, confidence=1.0
Backend: PUT /api/admin/image-review/products/{product_id}/reject sets status=placeholder, clears image_url
Backend: PUT /api/admin/image-review/products/{product_id}/url sets custom URL and approves
Backend: PUT /api/admin/image-review/products/{product_id}/url without url param returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/admin/image-review/products/{product_id}/pin pins image
Backend: PUT /api/admin/image-review/products/{product_id}/pin unpins image
Backend: POST /api/admin/image-review/bulk approve updates multiple products
Backend: POST /api/admin/image-review/bulk reject updates multiple products
Backend: POST /api/admin/image-review/bulk mark_needs_review updates products
Backend: POST /api/admin/image-review/bulk invalid_action returns 400
Backend: POST /api/admin/image-review/bulk missing params returns 400
Frontend: Image Review Dashboard page loads at /admin/image-review
Frontend: Metrics cards show Total, Needs Review, Pending, Approved, Rejected, Placeholder, Pinned
Frontend: Filter buttons (All, Needs Review, Pending, Approved, Rejected, Placeholder) work
Frontend: Product grid displays 20 product cards per page
Frontend: Clicking product opens detail view
Frontend: Detail view shows product name, status, confidence, pinned status, trend score
Frontend: Detail view has Approve, Reject, Pin buttons
Frontend: Detail view has custom URL input with Set button
Frontend: Detail view has rejection reason input
Frontend: Back to Review Queue button returns to grid view
Frontend: Select all checkbox enables bulk selection
Frontend: Bulk actions (Approve, Reject, Re-review) appear when items selected
seed_data_creation: Used existing products with image_status metadata. Test IDs: 5d241fc9-383b-4dcc-b406-ba40590ed6a3, f6d631f2-00da-4ea5-9ca2-0ce2469856b0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Image Review Dashboard fully verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/image-review/metrics, GET/PUT /api/admin/image-review/products with approve/reject/url/pin actions, POST /api/admin/image-review/bulk with actions: approve, reject, mark_placeholder, mark_needs_review. All endpoints require admin auth (403 without). Frontend at /admin/image-review with AdminRoute guard. Product data includes image_status (needs_review/pending/approved/rejected/placeholder), image_confidence, image_pinned, image_candidates.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - All endpoints use real MongoDB products collection with image metadata
